parameters.query:
SELECT id, telegram_id, first_name, age, gender, weight_kg, goal, activity_level, daily_calorie_target
FROM users
WHERE telegram_id = $1

SELECT log_date, calories_consumed, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g,
       sleep_hours, energy_level, mood, workout_done, food_description
FROM daily_logs
WHERE user_id = $1
ORDER BY log_date DESC
LIMIT 7

SELECT recommendations, identified_gaps, recommended_at
FROM supplement_recommendations
WHERE user_id = $1
ORDER BY recommended_at DESC
LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
💊 Analyzing your recent nutrition patterns...

🔍 Identifying potential gaps and crafting your supplement plan.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO supplement_recommendations
  (user_id, goal_at_time, recommendations, identified_gaps, raw_ai_response)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb, $5)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO feature_events (user_id, feature_id, event_type, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'supplement_advisor', 'supplement_recommended', $2::jsonb)
